name: AI Automation Agency
title_template: AI Automation Agency {{CITY_NAME}} | Automate Workflows With AI
description_template: We act as your AI automation agency, designing and building automations that remove manual work, connect business tools, and turn repetitive workflows into reliable systems.
commercial_model: Project delivery or monthly automation partner
starting_price: Projects start at EUR 8,000. Monthly automation work starts at EUR 4,000.
good_fit: Your team loses time to repeated admin, follow-up, reporting, handoffs, or tool-to-tool work.
deliverables: Workflow map, automation logic, system integrations, test cases, human-review rules, and launch support.

outcomes.title: Less manual work
outcomes.description: Repetitive tasks move from people to reliable AI-assisted workflows.

outcomes.title: Faster operations
outcomes.description: Lead routing, reporting, support, approvals, and internal handoffs happen with less delay.

outcomes.title: Connected systems
outcomes.description: Your CRM, inbox, forms, spreadsheets, databases, and internal tools work together.

problems.title: The same tasks happen every day
problems.description: Your team copies data, sends follow-ups, updates records, prepares reports, or moves work between tools by hand.

problems.title: Workflows break between systems
problems.description: Important work depends on people remembering the next step because your tools are not connected properly.

problems.title: Slow handoffs cost revenue and focus
problems.description: Leads wait, approvals stall, customer requests sit open, and managers lack current information.

process_steps.title: We map the workflow
process_steps.description: We identify the repeated tasks, decisions, tools, and exceptions that shape the process.

process_steps.title: We build the automation
process_steps.description: We connect the systems, add AI where it improves the workflow, and keep human review where judgment is needed.

process_steps.title: We monitor and improve
process_steps.description: We test the automation, handle edge cases, and keep improving it as the business changes.

faq.q: What does an AI automation agency actually build?
faq.a: We build workflow automations, AI-assisted processes, data routing, reporting flows, support flows, sales follow-up systems, and internal tools that reduce manual work.

faq.q: Can you work with the tools we already use?
faq.a: Yes. We usually build around the systems already in place, such as CRM, email, forms, spreadsheets, databases, and internal tools.

faq.q: Do all automations run without people?
faq.a: No. Some steps should stay human-in-the-loop. We design the workflow so AI handles repeatable work and people handle judgment, approval, and exceptions.

name: AI Consulting Services
title_template: AI Consulting Services {{CITY_NAME}} | Practical AI Strategy and Roadmaps
description_template: We provide practical AI consulting services for companies that need clear priorities, realistic use cases, data boundaries, budget shape, and a delivery roadmap before building.
commercial_model: Fixed-fee consulting sprint or monthly advisory
good_fit: You know AI matters, but you need a serious plan before spending on tools or development.
deliverables: Use-case shortlist, readiness review, risk notes, budget shape, prioritized roadmap, and next-step scope.

outcomes.title: Clear AI priorities
outcomes.description: You know which AI opportunities are worth doing first and which ones should wait.

outcomes.title: Lower implementation risk
outcomes.description: Data, privacy, workflow, team, and budget questions are handled before the build starts.

outcomes.title: Practical roadmap
outcomes.description: You get a sequence of work that can move from review to build and support.

problems.title: Everyone has AI ideas, but no clear order
problems.description: Different teams want different tools and nobody knows which use case has the strongest business case.

problems.title: Budget is hard to approve without a plan
problems.description: Leadership needs scope, expected value, timeline, and risk before committing to AI work.

problems.title: Data and privacy rules are unclear
problems.description: Teams want to use AI but do not know what data can be used safely or how the workflow should be controlled.

process_steps.title: We review the business context
process_steps.description: We look at goals, workflows, current tools, pain points, data sources, and operating constraints.

process_steps.title: We rank the opportunities
process_steps.description: We compare use cases by impact, effort, risk, dependency, and speed to value.

process_steps.title: We define the roadmap
process_steps.description: You get a practical plan with the first project, supporting work, and next-stage opportunities.

faq.q: Is this strategy only, or do you also build?
faq.a: We do both. Consulting can be bought on its own, or it can lead directly into automation, AI agent development, or custom AI solution delivery.

faq.q: Do we need clean data before starting?
faq.a: No. Part of the work is understanding what data exists, what is usable, and what needs cleanup or protection.

faq.q: Can you help us choose what not to build?
faq.a: Yes. A good AI plan should remove bad ideas as clearly as it prioritizes good ones.

name: AI Agent Development
title_template: AI Agent Development {{CITY_NAME}} | Build AI Agents for Business Workflows
description_template: We design and build AI agents for business workflows, including research agents, support agents, sales assistants, internal copilots, and task-routing agents with clear human controls.
commercial_model: Agent prototype, production build, or monthly improvement partner
starting_price: Agent prototypes start at EUR 5,000. Production builds start at EUR 10,000.
good_fit: You want AI to carry out repeatable business tasks, not only answer one-off prompts.
deliverables: Agent job definition, instructions, tool connections, permission rules, logging, evaluation, and handoff.

outcomes.title: Task-focused AI agents
outcomes.description: Agents are built around specific jobs, tools, data sources, permissions, and expected outputs.

outcomes.title: Human control
outcomes.description: Review steps, approval rules, escalation paths, and logging are designed into the workflow.

outcomes.title: Business integration
outcomes.description: Agents connect to the systems and processes your team already uses.

problems.title: Generic chatbots are not enough
problems.description: Your team needs AI that can follow a workflow, use business context, and produce structured output.

problems.title: Tasks need judgment and repeatability
problems.description: The work is too structured to stay fully manual, but too important to automate carelessly.

problems.title: The agent needs access to real tools
problems.description: A useful agent must connect with CRM, ticketing, documents, databases, email, or internal systems.

process_steps.title: We define the agent job
process_steps.description: We decide exactly what the agent should do, what it should not do, and when a person must review.

process_steps.title: We build and connect it
process_steps.description: We create the prompts, tools, data access, workflow logic, logging, and user interface needed for daily use.

process_steps.title: We test edge cases
process_steps.description: We evaluate outputs, improve instructions, add guardrails, and prepare the agent for real work.

faq.q: What kind of AI agents can you build?
faq.a: We can build research agents, sales assistants, support agents, operations copilots, document-processing agents, routing agents, and internal workflow agents.

faq.q: Can agents use our company data?
faq.a: Yes, when the data boundaries are clear. We design access, permissions, logging, and privacy rules around the business need.

faq.q: Do agents replace the team?
faq.a: Usually no. The best business agents remove repetitive work, prepare decisions, route tasks, and support the team while keeping human control where it matters.

name: Custom AI Solutions for Businesses
title_template: Custom AI Solutions for Businesses {{CITY_NAME}} | Practical AI Systems
description_template: We build custom AI solutions for businesses that need tailored AI systems, workflow automation, AI agents, dashboards, data analysis, and internal tools instead of generic AI products.
commercial_model: Fixed-scope project or monthly AI product team
starting_price: Custom AI solution projects start at EUR 10,000.
good_fit: Your use case is specific to your business and cannot be solved well by a generic AI tool.
deliverables: Use-case design, AI workflow or application build, integrations, dashboards or interfaces, testing, and handover.

outcomes.title: Tailored AI systems
outcomes.description: The solution is built around your workflow, data, users, and business rules.

outcomes.title: Production-ready delivery
outcomes.description: The work includes implementation, testing, handover, and practical adoption support.

outcomes.title: Long-term improvement
outcomes.description: The system can keep improving as the company learns what creates value.

problems.title: Generic AI tools do not fit the business
problems.description: Off-the-shelf tools cannot follow your process, access the right data, or match the way your team works.

problems.title: Data is useful but hard to activate
problems.description: The company has documents, records, reports, or operational data, but no AI system that can use it properly.

problems.title: The idea needs a real AI system
problems.description: The business needs an application, integration, dashboard, or workflow, not only prompts or advice.

process_steps.title: We define the use case
process_steps.description: We clarify users, inputs, outputs, data boundaries, business rules, and success measures.

process_steps.title: We build the system
process_steps.description: We create the AI system, integrations, AI layer, workflows, and interface needed for the use case.

process_steps.title: We launch and improve
process_steps.description: We test the system, train the team, monitor outputs, and improve the setup after launch.

faq.q: What makes this different from AI automation?
faq.a: AI automation usually improves a workflow. Custom AI solutions can include larger AI system builds, dashboards, data systems, agents, integrations, and internal applications.

faq.q: Can you build around our existing systems?
faq.a: Yes. Most custom AI projects connect to existing systems rather than replacing everything.

faq.q: Do you support the system after launch?
faq.a: Yes. Support, improvements, and monthly delivery can be included if the solution needs ongoing ownership.

name: AI Opportunity Review
title_template: AI Opportunity Review {{CITY_NAME}} | Find Where AI Can Make or Save Money
description_template: You give us the right business material. We hide private personal data and sensitive details where needed, then use our own AI review system to find where AI can increase revenue, reduce cost, improve cash flow, and remove waste.
good_fit: You know AI matters, but you do not want to guess where to start.
deliverables: Data intake checklist, sensitive-data handling, department analysis, opportunity shortlist, and priority report.

outcomes.title: Clear priorities
outcomes.description: You see where AI can create the biggest business value first.

outcomes.title: Less guesswork
outcomes.description: You stop chasing random tools and focus on real opportunities.

outcomes.title: Safer starting point
outcomes.description: Private details are hidden where needed before the review starts.

problems.title: You know AI is important but the next step is unclear
problems.description: Your team has tried public AI tools, but nobody knows what the real business opportunity is.

problems.title: You want real business results, not just faster typing
problems.description: The goal is more revenue, lower cost, better cash flow, and better control.

problems.title: Your business knowledge is spread across too many files and systems
problems.description: Important information exists, but nobody has reviewed it properly through an AI lens.

process_steps.title: You share the right material
process_steps.description: We collect the business material we need and remove private details where needed.

process_steps.title: We run the review
process_steps.description: Our own AI review system looks for places where AI can make or save money.

process_steps.title: We give you a clear shortlist
process_steps.description: You get the best opportunities in simple business language, not theory.

faq.q: Do we need to prepare perfect data first?
faq.a: No. We work with the material you already have and organize the review around it.

faq.q: Do you handle private or sensitive information carefully?
faq.a: Yes. We hide private personal data and sensitive details where needed before review.

faq.q: What do we get at the end?
faq.a: You get a simple list of the best AI opportunities for your business and which ones deserve attention first.

name: AI Plan
title_template: AI Plan {{CITY_NAME}} | Turn Good AI Ideas Into a Real Plan
description_template: We turn the findings into a simple working plan. We decide what to do first, what can be a short project, what should be monthly support, what budget makes sense, and how the work should move over time.
good_fit: You already have ideas, but you need a clear order, budget, and business model before building.
deliverables: Ranked roadmap, project sequence, budget model, ownership plan, risk notes, and first implementation scope.

outcomes.title: Simple next steps
outcomes.description: You know what to do now, what to do later, and what to ignore.

outcomes.title: Clear buying model
outcomes.description: We shape the work as a short project, a monthly service, or a mix of both.

outcomes.title: Better spending
outcomes.description: You stop wasting money on work that should not come first.

problems.title: Too many AI ideas are competing at once
problems.description: Different teams want different things and nobody knows what comes first.

problems.title: Budget decisions are hard without a plan
problems.description: You need a simple commercial model before you commit to build work.

problems.title: You want movement, but not chaos
problems.description: The business needs a clear order of work so the rollout stays practical.

process_steps.title: We review the opportunities
process_steps.description: We take the findings and rank them by business value, effort, and urgency.

process_steps.title: We shape the work
process_steps.description: We decide what should be fixed-fee work, what should be monthly work, and what should wait.

process_steps.title: You get the plan
process_steps.description: You get a simple plan with order, scope, and a clear commercial path.

faq.q: Can we buy this without the review first?
faq.a: Yes. If you already know enough about the business case, we can start with the plan.

faq.q: Do you tell us whether something should be a project or a monthly service?
faq.a: Yes. That is one of the main reasons for this service.

faq.q: Is this a strategy deck?
faq.a: No. This is a working plan for real delivery.

name: AI Build & Setup
title_template: AI Build & Setup {{CITY_NAME}} | Build the Tools and Workflows Around AI
description_template: We do the real work. We build the tools, AI systems, automations, and workflows around AI, then connect them to the way your business already works.
commercial_model: Fixed-price project or monthly build partner
starting_price: Projects start at EUR 8,000. Monthly work starts at EUR 4,000.
good_fit: You already know what should be built and want a team to set it up properly.
deliverables: Build scope, AI workflow implementation, integrations, testing, rollout support, and early iteration.

outcomes.title: Real delivery
outcomes.description: Ideas turn into working tools and working business flows.

outcomes.title: Better fit
outcomes.description: The work is shaped around how your company already operates.

outcomes.title: Less friction
outcomes.description: The new setup is connected to the tools and processes your team already uses.

problems.title: You know what needs to be built, but nobody is building it
problems.description: The business is clear on direction, but the delivery is stuck.

problems.title: Your current tools do not work together well
problems.description: The value is blocked because the systems, steps, and ownership are fragmented.

problems.title: Internal teams are already full
problems.description: The work matters, but there is no spare time to design, build, and set it up properly.

process_steps.title: We scope the build
process_steps.description: We turn the plan into clear work with clear boundaries.

process_steps.title: We build and connect it
process_steps.description: We set up the tools, AI systems, and workflows around AI.

process_steps.title: We launch it properly
process_steps.description: We test the work, fix the rough edges, and get it ready for daily use.

faq.q: Do you only work on new systems?
faq.a: No. We can also improve or extend systems you already have.

faq.q: Can this be bought as a monthly service instead of one big project?
faq.a: Yes. We can shape the build work around your timeline and budget.

faq.q: Do you also set up the workflow around the tool?
faq.a: Yes. We do not stop at the tool itself. We set up how the work should run around it.

name: AI Training
title_template: AI Training {{CITY_NAME}} | Train Your Team to Use AI Properly
description_template: We train your team on the new setup, on existing AI tools, or on both. The goal is simple: better use, better output, better decisions, and more value from the tools you already pay for.
commercial_model: Standalone workshop or monthly training plan
good_fit: Your team has access to AI tools, but usage is weak, messy, or inconsistent.
deliverables: Role-based sessions, practical exercises, usage rules, prompt and workflow guidance, and adoption follow-up.

outcomes.title: Better team use
outcomes.description: People understand what to do, what not to do, and how to get better results.

outcomes.title: More value from existing tools
outcomes.description: The tools you already pay for start creating more business value.

outcomes.title: Stronger adoption
outcomes.description: The new setup becomes part of daily work instead of being ignored.

problems.title: People have access to AI but do not use it well
problems.description: The tool is there, but the business is not getting much value from it.

problems.title: Team usage is inconsistent
problems.description: Some people use AI too much, some avoid it, and nobody follows the same good habits.

problems.title: You are paying for tools without strong return
problems.description: Without training, even good tools stay underused.

process_steps.title: We look at the current level
process_steps.description: We check what people already know and where the gaps are.

process_steps.title: We train around real work
process_steps.description: We keep the sessions practical and tied to the jobs your team actually does.

process_steps.title: We help the habits stick
process_steps.description: We make sure the learning turns into daily use.

faq.q: Can we buy training without buying build work?
faq.a: Yes. Training can be a standalone service.

faq.q: Can you train teams on tools they already use?
faq.a: Yes. We can train around your current setup.

faq.q: Is this only for technical teams?
faq.a: No. We can train business teams as well.

name: AI Support
title_template: AI Support {{CITY_NAME}} | Keep Your AI Tools and Workflows Working
description_template: We stay on after launch or step in when you already have something running. We fix issues, improve results, support difficult cases, and help the setup keep working as the business changes.
starting_price: Starts at EUR 1,500 per month or EUR 150 per hour
good_fit: You already have AI tools or workflows and need reliable help to keep them useful.
deliverables: Issue triage, output tuning, workflow fixes, usage support, small improvements, and escalation help.

outcomes.title: Less downtime
outcomes.description: Problems are fixed before they turn into bigger business issues.

outcomes.title: Better long-term value
outcomes.description: The setup keeps improving instead of slowly becoming dead weight.

outcomes.title: Help when things get messy
outcomes.description: You have a clear place to go when the work becomes difficult or unusual.

problems.title: You already have AI running but it needs help
problems.description: The first launch is done, but the business still needs support.

problems.title: Nobody owns the hard edge cases
problems.description: When something unusual happens, the team does not know who should fix it.

problems.title: The business keeps changing
problems.description: Without support, the setup falls behind the way the company actually works.

process_steps.title: We review what is already in place
process_steps.description: We look at the current setup and the current problems.

process_steps.title: We fix and improve
process_steps.description: We handle support issues and make the setup stronger over time.

process_steps.title: We stay available
process_steps.description: You get ongoing help based on the support model that fits you best.

faq.q: Can we buy support without buying the build from you first?
faq.a: Yes. We can support setups that were built elsewhere.

faq.q: Do you only offer monthly support?
faq.a: No. We can also help on a pay-as-you-go basis for specific needs.

faq.q: Can support include improvements, not just fixes?
faq.a: Yes. Support can include small improvements and ongoing cleanup.
